name: establishing-tension
prompt: Wide shot from corner. Officers quarters interior, warm amber lighting. Dark-haired man in dark suit standing near table LEFT of frame, facing right. Brunette woman in elegant dark attire standing near table RIGHT of frame, facing him. Military datapad face-down on table between them. Window back wall showing city lights. Both figures still, neither moving. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: sera-breaks-it
prompt: Medium shot from LEFT side. Brunette woman standing at table, looking down at datapad between them. Dark fitted attire with tech accents. Her expression controlled. Behind her: warm amber room, window visible. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: You're not going to open it, are you.

name: the-datapad
prompt: Close-up on dark table surface. Military datapad lying face-down, untouched. Warm amber light from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
